channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Armed men kidnap security expert in gang-ridden Haiti
item.description: James Boyard serves as cabinet director of Haiti's Defense Ministry and police inspector general.

item.title: Utah officers break down doors to rescue people from apartment fire
item.description: Dramatic video shows police braving flames to wake residents, including children, and lead them to safety.

item.title: One killed, nine injured in Texas mass shooting; suspect dead
item.description: The suspect, Victor Mata Villarreal, was wanted for attempted murder of a police officer after a vehicle chase.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says agreement with Iran will be signed 'tomorrow'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
